title: ElytraWEEE
description: Hold a firework, jump, and fly — your elytra equips itself and you glide instantly. Safe chestplate swap, plus a mid-air fast-swap key for mace PvP.
body:
# ElytraWEEE

**Hold a firework. Jump. Fly.** Your elytra equips itself and you start gliding instantly — chestplate swapped out safely, never dropped, and put back on when you land.

Client-only Fabric mod for **Minecraft 26.1.2**. Works on servers, no server install needed.

## Why firework-triggered, not jump-triggered?

Most auto-elytra mods deploy the elytra **every time you jump** — which wrecks combat: every jump-crit you land on an enemy accidentally throws your elytra on. ElytraWEEE only deploys when you're **holding a firework and jump**, so your normal combat jumps and **jump-crit attacks stay completely untouched**. You fly only when you actually mean to.

## What it does

- **Jump + firework -> instant flight.** One jump. You glide right away — no second tap.
- **Land -> chestplate comes back.** Drop the firework after landing and your chestplate returns automatically.
- **Grace window.** Jumped a hair too early? Grab the firework within ~0.5s and it still launches.
- **Never drops your gear.** All swaps are safe. No chestplate? The elytra just goes back where it came from. Inventory full? It stays on.

## Fast swap (mace PvP)

One key to flip **elytra <-> chestplate instantly — even mid-air.** Swap to chestplate, hit, swap back, and you **keep gliding automatically** (no re-jump). Works even with auto-deploy off.

## Keybinds

Under **Options -> Controls -> ElytraWEEE** (all unbound by default — set your own): Fast swap, Toggle on/off, Open settings.

## Settings

**Mod Menu -> ElytraWEEE** — tabs for General, Auto-Deploy, Swap-Back, Fast Swap, and Info.

> The mod only manages an elytra **it** deployed. Put one on yourself? It leaves your gear alone.

## Requirements

- Fabric API
- Cloth Config
- Mod Menu *(optional — opens the settings screen)*

by dev-limucc · MIT
